last_completed_round.direction_name: Rewrite shared fragment delivery to cut MIO pressure
last_completed_round.hypothesis: Round 12 falsified barrier frequency as the main limiter: barrier stalls dropped sharply while runtime regressed, tensor active fell to 28.43%, and MIO throttle climbed to 25.25%. The next aggressive move should target the tensor feed path itself by changing how A/B tiles are laid out in shared memory and how warps consume them so WMMA loads stop overdriving the MIO/LSU path.

notes: Build passed for round 14/20. Node A will measure the result next.
